footer.deskripsi: Mitra Bangsa University produces excellent generations ready to face global challenges and the digital workplace through high-quality education.
footer.hak_cipta: © 2026 Mitra Bangsa University. All Rights Reserved.

home.sambutan_p1: The facilities and infrastructure of our campus include classrooms equipped with the latest learning standards, a Library providing the newest books, an e-Library, and reputable national and international journals.
home.sambutan_p2: Modern Computer Laboratories support the student learning process and are utilized by lecturers to carry out the Tri Dharma of Higher Education activities.
home.kurikulum_desc: Relevant to the needs of the future industry.
home.kemitraan_desc: Extensive network of alumni and corporations.
home.pilih_prodi_desc: Choose a study program that suits your passion and career goals with UMIBA.
home.fak_manajemen_desc: Prepare yourself to become a future business leader with a deep understanding of strategic management and entrepreneurship.
home.fak_hukum_desc: Become a competent legal expert with high integrity, ready to face national and international legal dynamics.
home.fak_ti_desc: Master future technology and actuarial science with a continuously developing curriculum following global digital industry trends.
home.lokasi_desc: Visit our campuses in South Jakarta and Bintaro
home.alamat_pm: Jl. Raya Tj. Barat No.11, RT.11/RW.8, Pejaten Timur, Ps. Minggu, South Jakarta City, Special Capital Region of Jakarta 12530
home.alamat_bintaro: Jl. Perdagangan No.54, RT.4/RW.7, Bintaro, Pesanggrahan, South Jakarta City, Special Capital Region of Jakarta 12330
home.penerimaan_desc: Don't miss the golden opportunity to join us. Limited quota!
